minor.author: 7559015+janechu@users.noreply.github.com
minor.comment: feat: auto-escape code samples inside `<code>` elements during SSR — braces (`{`/`}`) everywhere and the angle brackets of FAST directive tags (`<f-when>`, `<f-repeat>`) — so literal binding-like text and directive syntax render correctly while real HTML/custom elements inside `<code>` remain live DOM elements. Also exposes a new `escape_code_samples(html)` WASM export so build-time tooling can apply the same escape to author HTML that is injected into a rendered page outside the normal render pipeline.

minor.author: 7559015+janechu@users.noreply.github.com
minor.comment: feat: propagate host attributes from inner <template> of <f-template> onto the rendered host element opening tag during SSR (static, {{expr}}, and ?name="{{expr}}" bindings; author-provided host attributes win on conflict; client-only attribute prefixes @, :, f-ref, f-slotted, f-children are skipped)
